scripts.build: tsc && cp src/ai_composition_guidelines.json lib/ && cp -r catalogs lib/
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy:dev: firebase use dev && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:dev-to-prod: firebase use default && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.test: tsc && node --test lib/bodyScanTierPlan.test.js lib/perfectBreathPlan.test.js lib/fractionalIntroTimeline.test.js lib/fractionalNfImTimeline.test.js lib/fractionalTimeline.test.js lib/morningVisualizationPlan.test.js lib/eveningVisualizationPlan.test.js lib/expandFractionalCuesIntro.test.js lib/introFractionalPlan.test.js lib/meditationThemes.test.js lib/aiMeditationDisplayTitle.test.js lib/phaseAllocation.test.js lib/cueBuilder.test.js lib/fractionalSurfaceCueNormalize.test.js
